## Java Project Setup
This is a Maven-based Java project scaffold.

## Getting Started
1. Install Maven if not already installed
2. Use VS Code tasks to build and run the project
3. Modify source code in `src/main/java`

## Available Tasks
- **Build (Maven)** - Compile and package the project
- **Run App** - Execute the main application
- **Test** - Run unit tests

## Project Structure
- `src/main/java` - Main application source code
- `src/test/java` - Test source code
- `pom.xml` - Maven configuration file
- `.vscode/tasks.json` - VS Code build and run tasks
